CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(return_case_type__c, "נפתחה עוד פנייה לפנייה זו" ),ISPICKVAL(return_case_type__c, "אחרון" )), IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000ckNa&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1563183874000","",30,30), "")
CustomField.label: Returning Case Icon
